creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->gnome

We (FreeBSD GNOME Team) will taking care of it since ahze has already ported 
webkit in our MC CVS in about over a month ago. See here:
